    devel/pycharm-pro: Fix staging with non-default Python versions

    * Replace two occurrences in pkg-plist where PYTHON_VER shouldn't be
      used as a substitution because "3.7" is really hardcoded in the paths.

    PR:             253815
    Approved by:    portmgr (build fix)
    MFH:            2021Q2

    (cherry picked from commit 980acd02507f9efef60f5aaf9aff71bb952571ff)
